---
title: "Project 3 - Exploring NBA Salary Data"
author: "Erin Yang"
format: 
  closeread-html:
    theme: cosmo
    cr-style:
      section-background-color: white
      narrative-background-color-sidebar: black
      narrative-text-color-sidebar: white
      narrative-font-size: 2em
embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# load packages and/or import data set(s)
library(tidyverse)
nba <- read.csv('/Users/eriny/Documents/GitHub/stat-133/project/project3/nba2025-clean.csv')
```

:::: {.cr-section}

The NBA. @cr-players

So many players.

But are they all "worth" the same?

Let's find out!

:::{#cr-players}
![](https://fadeawayworld.net/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/285925087_543090000781662_6195783055162636562_n.jpg)
:::

1 - Salary distribution @cr-plot2

Here is a histogram showing the full distribution of salaries amongst all NBA players. 

Don't worry about the stat bin warning thing.

There's a wide range of salaries! Imagine someone making 10x the amount of money you do for the same job.

But most people be making under $10 million. (which is still a freak ton!)


::: {#cr-plot2}
```{r}
ggplot(data = nba, aes(x = salary)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  labs(title = 'Distribution of NBA Player Salaries', x = 'Salary', y = 'Count')
```
:::

2 - Summary Statistics @cr-sum

The mean salary is more than double the median salary! This indicates that the data is skewed to the right and there are some very large extremes.

Also the minimum salary of 12k a year is actually diabolical?? maybe they're a temp worker...

::: {#cr-sum}

```{r}
summary(nba)
```
:::

3 - 10 Highest Paid Players @cr-tten

Steph Curry at the top, ofc!!

not gonna lie idk any of the other ppl except Kevin Durant...

All the top 10 paid players are getting around $50 million, which is SO MUCH

But truly Steph Curry is a step above the rest at $55 million @cr-steph

the soulless eyes of a rich af man -->

::: {#cr-steph}
![](https://www.usab.com/imgproxy/qBABZwWRZ71S1hqM_Bqjayn9vpO6cWgPP_Ki7X4dWmc/rs:fit:3000:0:0/g:ce/q:90/aHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9yYWdlLmdvb2dsZWFwaXMuY29tL3VzYWItY29tLXByb2QvdXBsb2FkLzIwMjQvMDcvMDkvNDc0OTRhNTktYmM2NC00MmRiLWJmNDctNTA1YjQ5ZmU4OTg2LmpwZw.png)

:::


::: {#cr-tten}

```{r}
nbaten <- nba |> 
  select(player, team, position, salary) |>
  arrange(desc(salary)) |>
  slice(1:10)

nbaten
```

:::

4 - Position vs Salary @cr-position

It seems that point guards are paid significantly more on average than the other positions, perhaps because they are the "leaders"

The shooting guard makes the least amount of money on average... rip... and they're the ones scoring the most points too!

::: {#cr-position}

```{r}
nba_po <- nba |>
  group_by(position) |>
  summarize('avg_salary' = mean(salary))

nba_po_graph <- ggplot(nba_po, aes(x = position, y = avg_salary)) +
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  labs(title = 'Average Salary per Basketball Position', x = 'Positions', y = 'Average Salary')

nba_po_graph

```

:::

5 - Teams Ranked by Salary @cr-teams

THe total salaries of most teams are around the same, which is fair.

The overall highest paid team is the Phoenix Suns!


::: {#cr-teams}

```{r}
sal <- nba |>
  group_by(team) |>
  summarize('sum_salary' = sum(salary)) |>
  arrange(desc(sum_salary)) |>
  slice(1:10)

sal_graph <- ggplot(sal, aes(x = team, y = sum_salary)) +
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  labs(title = 'Top 10 Teams by Salary', x = 'Team', y = 'Total Salary')

sal_graph
```

:::

6 - Is Salary Proportional to Experience? @cr-exp

So it seems like generally the answer is yes, at least until you pass the 12 years mark...

Maybe those people are either older and don't play as well, or their contract is older and hasn't been updated accordingly

Anyway who's that person pulling up the average salary for those with 21 years of experience??



::: {#cr-exp}

```{r}
exp <- nba |>
  group_by(experience) |>
  summarize('avg_salary' = mean(salary)) |>
  arrange(desc(avg_salary))

exp_graph <- ggplot(exp, aes(x = experience, y = avg_salary)) +
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity') +
  labs(title = 'Years of Experience vs Salary', x = 'Years of Experience', y = 'Average Salary')

exp_graph
```

:::

It's LeBron!!!! @cr-lebron

And he's the player with the most years of experience too! @cr-lestats

Goated unc frfr [@cr-unc]{scale-by="3"}

::: {#cr-lebron}
![](https://a.espncdn.com/i/headshots/nba/players/full/1966.png)
:::

::: {#cr-lestats}

```{r}

nba |> filter(experience == 21)
```

:::

::: {#cr-unc}
![](https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTl9xj7YyTKi8oh6IQIVRyYAu_m4x6hZUzcBA&s)
:::

Ok thank u for watching!! @cr-ty

Bye!!

Bye!!!

BYEEEE!!!!

ok im leaving [@cr-ty]{scale-by="0.1"}

::: {#cr-ty}
![](https://media.tenor.com/HA2i7jF0UBsAAAAM/spinning-ball-basketball.gif)
:::

::::
